tasks.label: Update Flyout Button subtree
args: $repo = (Resolve-Path '..\flyout-button').Path; $split = git -C $repo subtree split --prefix=addons/flyout_button main; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; git -C $repo branch -f flyout-button-addon $split; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; git subtree pull --prefix=addons/flyout_button $repo flyout-button-addon --squash
